exploration_notes: Traced the complete PostgreSQL query execution pipeline from exec_simple_query() through all 5 stages. The pipeline follows: (1) Parser (raw_parser via scan.l/gram.y) produces RawStmt nodes, (2) Analyzer (parse_analyze_fixedparams → transformStmt) resolves names/types to produce Query nodes, (3) Rewriter (QueryRewrite) expands views/applies rules, (4) Planner uses two-phase optimization — Phase 1: make_one_rel() in allpaths.c generates Path objects with cost estimates, Phase 2: create_plan() in
